title: sida ovalis
intro: Sida ovalis, also known as the country mallow, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Sida ovalis include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Sida ovalis is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its roots and leaves can also be used to make infusions or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
